reason: The image depicts a horse-drawn carriage traveling at night, which aligns with the event of the Flight to Varennes. The clothing of the passengers seems period-appropriate. The lanterns on the carriage are a bit too bright and look like modern light bulbs, which is an anachronism. Also the carriage looks a bit too perfect and "new". It lacks the wear and tear expected of a vehicle in use during that era. No overtly fantastical or modern elements are present. The atmosphere is mostly fitting, though the lighting from the lanterns raises suspicion.
